name: Revamp Credit Solutions
description_short: Dallas-based credit repair company that disputes errors and negative items on credit reports through the three major bureaus. Claims results in 45 days using their proprietary credit-boosting strategy.
description_long:
Revamp Credit Solutions is a credit repair firm headquartered in Dallas, Texas (9304 Forest Lane) that specializes in disputing inaccurate and negative items on client credit reports. The company operates in the credit repair space, which involves identifying errors on credit reports, disputing them with the three major bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion) and original creditors, and auditing accounts for compliance.

The company offers a structured three-phase process: (1) free credit consultation including review of a 3-bureau credit report and customized action plan, (2) detailed line-by-line analysis by a Credit Repair Consultant with phone consultation to identify dispute candidates, and (3) the dispute process itself, with promised results within approximately 30 days after disputes are submitted. They also offer related services including debt elimination, credit establishment guidance, and mortgage preparation counseling. Clients receive a dedicated account manager and access to a 24/7 client portal to track progress.

Revamp positions itself around personal service, transparency, and speed. They emphasize an "accelerated program" that allegedly delivers results faster than competitors, offer 24/7 portal access for tracking, provide free credit analysis, and maintain email alert systems. They promote multiple payment options and claim affordable pricing, though specific fee structures are not detailed on the website.

A critical caveat: the company makes specific performance claims ("Results in 45 days") that are difficult to verify and dependent entirely on individual credit situations, dispute outcomes, and the credit bureaus' timelines. Credit repair outcomes are inherently variable. The website lacks specific pricing information, detailed client testimonials with measurable results, or transparent disclosure of limitations. Like most credit repair companies, their core value proposition depends on whether clients actually have disputable errors on their reports—not all negative items are errors and therefore not all are removable.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free credit consultation with 3-bureau report review before enrolling
Dedicated account manager assigned to each client for personalized service
24/7 client portal access for real-time progress tracking and transparency
Structured 3-phase process (consultation, analysis, dispute) clearly explained on website
Disputes processed through all three major bureaus plus original creditors and collection agencies
Additional services beyond disputes: debt elimination, credit establishment, mortgage preparation
Email alerts and notifications to keep clients informed throughout the process
cons: Claims "Results in 45 days" but acknowledges disputes take ~30 days after submission—timeline claims appear optimistic and context-dependent
No specific pricing information disclosed on website; pricing page exists but details not shown
No verifiable client testimonials or case studies with actual credit score improvements provided
No explicit disclosure of what outcomes cannot be guaranteed (e.g., removal of accurate negative items)
Vague mission statement about scores increasing 'according to how many Positive Accounts you have'—doesn't clearly explain factors outside their control
best_for: Consumers with genuine errors or inaccurate negative items on their credit reports who want professional dispute assistance
People preparing for mortgage applications and need credit improvement guidance alongside dispute services
Borrowers seeking hand-holding and personal accountability throughout the credit repair process
diagnosis: Revamp Credit Solutions is best for consumers who have identified or suspect errors on their credit reports and want professional dispute assistance with dedicated service. The main caveat is that credit repair outcomes depend heavily on whether items are actually inaccurate (not just negative)—the company cannot remove accurate delinquencies or late payments, and their '45-day results' claim oversimplifies the variable timelines involved in dispute resolution.
services: Free credit consultation and 3-bureau credit report review
Line-by-line credit report analysis by Credit Repair Consultant
Dispute filing with Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion
Dispute filing with original creditors and collection agencies
24/7 client portal access and progress tracking
Email alerts and score monitoring notifications
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
